scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (boards, board_users, board_items, board_tags, board_connectors). Miro's write endpoints (board/item creation, updates, deletion) are out of scope for this migration (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented board creation; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented board updates; Pass B capability expansion
board deletion not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
item creation not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
single-item retrieval not modeled by legacy; the board_items stream already lists every item
organization-level membership not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
